notes: Pepper-loving corper should penalize a no-pepper product despite large portion.
user_persona: Osun-based corper, budget conscious, likes peppery food, quick service, and generous portions.
product_details:
Product:
Jollof Bowl with Grilled Chicken

Category: food
Description: Smoky jollof rice with grilled chicken, fried plantain, and no pepper
Price: 4500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 35
Portion: large
Spice level: high

expected.reference_review: As a corper managing my money, the large portion helped but the pepper was missing badly. Jollof with no pepper does not fit what I wanted, and for 4500 NGN I expected better heat and value.

notes: Good fit on pepper and portion, but budget should prevent a perfect score.
user_persona: Ondo-based corper, budget conscious, likes peppery food, quick service, and generous portions.
product_details:
Product:
Jollof Bowl with Grilled Chicken

Category: food
Description: Smoky jollof rice with grilled chicken, fried plantain, and pepper sauce
Price: 4500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 35
Portion: large
Spice level: high

expected.reference_review: For a corper, 4500 NGN is not small money, but the pepper was good and the portion was filling. Delivery was reasonable and the chicken plus plantain made it feel worth it, just not a perfect budget meal.

notes: Budget student should react strongly to small portion and slow delivery.
user_persona: Lagos student, budget conscious, likes peppery food, quick service, and generous portions.
product_details:
Product:
Mini Pepper Rice

Category: food
Description: Small rice bowl with pepper sauce and one piece of chicken
Price: 4200
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 55
Portion: small
Spice level: high

expected.reference_review: As a Lagos student, this was not it. The pepper was there but the bowl was small, one piece of chicken was not enough, and waiting 55 minutes made the price feel worse.

notes: Busy worker should reward fast hot delivery, fair price, and large portion.
user_persona: Busy Abuja office worker, wants quick lunch, hot food, and generous portions at fair price.
product_details:
Product:
Office Rice Combo

Category: food
Description: Large hot rice bowl with chicken, plantain, and pepper sauce
Price: 2800
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 18
Portion: large
Spice level: medium

expected.reference_review: This worked well for a busy office lunch. The food arrived quick and hot, the portion was generous, and the price was fair for rice, chicken, plantain, and pepper sauce.

notes: Health-conscious persona should penalize oily spicy food even if flavour is strong.
user_persona: Health-conscious Lagos professional, avoids oily meals and does not like very spicy food.
product_details:
Product:
Extra Spicy Oil Rice

Category: food
Description: Very spicy rice cooked with extra palm oil and fried chicken
Price: 3500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 25
Portion: medium
Spice level: very high

expected.reference_review: The flavour was strong, but this was too oily and too spicy for how I eat. I avoid heavy palm oil meals, so the extra oil and very high heat made it hard to enjoy.

notes: Premium spender should reward excellent smoky flavour and fast service when budget is not a concern.
user_persona: Premium Lagos food buyer, cares most about smoky party-jollof taste, hot delivery, and quality chicken.
product_details:
Product:
Party Jollof Feast

Category: food
Description: Smoky party-style jollof rice with tender grilled chicken and pepper sauce
Price: 8500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 22
Portion: large
Spice level: medium high

expected.reference_review: The smoky jollof taste came through properly and the chicken was well grilled. It arrived hot and faster than I expected, so even at 8500 NGN it felt like a premium meal that delivered on quality.

notes: Electronics buyer can like product quality while penalizing late delivery and accessory quality.
user_persona: Value-driven Nigerian electronics buyer, checks battery life, accessories, and delivery reliability.
product_details:
Product:
BudgetMax Phone

Category: electronics
Description: Android phone with strong battery, basic camera, and weak charger in the box
Price: 95000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 2880

expected.reference_review: The battery is the best part of this phone and it lasts well for normal use, but the weak charger in the box and two-day delivery delay reduced the value for me. For 95000 NGN it is acceptable, not impressive.

notes: Queue-sensitive service customer should penalize slow handling even with polite staff.
user_persona: Akure bank customer, values quick service, clear explanation, and short queues.
product_details:
Product:
Account Upgrade Visit

Category: service
Description: Polite staff explained the process clearly, but the queue moved slowly and seating was limited after a 75-minute wait
Price: 0
Currency: NGN

expected.reference_review: The staff explained the account upgrade clearly and were polite, but the queue was too slow and seating finished quickly. After waiting 75 minutes, I left with the issue solved but not happy with the service time.

notes: Book reviewer should balance strong ending against slow opening chapters.
user_persona: Reader who likes clear writing and strong characters but complains when pacing drags.
product_details:
Product:
The Last Market Day

Category: book
Description: Novel with strong characters, clear prose, slow opening chapters, and a satisfying ending
Price: 5000
Currency: NGN

expected.reference_review: The characters are strong and the writing is clear, which kept me reading. The opening was slow and dragged more than I like, but the ending paid off enough for me to still recommend it.

notes: Reviewer should punish a product that contradicts the advertised description.
user_persona: Practical online shopper, cares about accurate descriptions, fair price, and durable build quality.
product_details:
Product:
Travel Backpack

Category: product
Description: Advertised as water-resistant but arrived with thin fabric and weak zippers
Price: 18000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 1440

expected.reference_review: The description was not accurate at all. It said water-resistant, but the fabric feels thin and the zippers are weak, so the price no longer feels fair even though it arrived.

notes: Disaster case for budget corper: wrong order, cold food, very late delivery. Must rate 1.
user_persona: NYSC corper in Akure, lives on allawee, likes peppery food, hates waiting.
product_details:
Product:
Jollof Bowl with Grilled Chicken

Category: food
Description: Cold jollof rice arrived with no pepper and a single piece of chicken, missing the plantain that was advertised
Price: 4500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 95
Portion: small
Spice level: none

expected.reference_review: As a corper managing allawee, this one pained me. The food came cold, no pepper, plantain was missing, and the small chicken did not justify 4500 NGN after waiting that long.

notes: Affordable cheap meal that hits every preference for a budget corper. Should be a clean 5.
user_persona: Lagos NYSC corper on allawee, loves peppery food, wants fast delivery and filling portions.
product_details:
Product:
Mama T Special Combo

Category: food
Description: Generous plate of peppery jollof with two pieces of chicken and fried plantain
Price: 1800
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 15
Portion: large
Spice level: high

expected.reference_review: For a corper on allawee, this was proper value. The pepper hit well, the portion was large, delivery was fast, and two pieces of chicken plus plantain for 1800 NGN made me happy.

notes: Ibadan reviewer with deep amala expectations should call out authenticity issues.
user_persona: Ibadan-based Yoruba auntie who has been eating amala her whole life and judges authenticity strictly.
product_details:
Product:
Amala and Ewedu Set

Category: food
Description: Black amala with light ewedu soup and assorted beef, served hot
Price: 3500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 30
Portion: medium
Spice level: medium

expected.reference_review: The amala came hot and the ewedu was light the way it should be. The assorted beef was fine, though the soup could have had a little more depth for an Ibadan standard.

notes: Port Harcourt native should reward authentic pepper soup with seafood expectations.
user_persona: Port Harcourt resident who grew up on fresh seafood and rates pepper soup by smell and heat.
product_details:
Product:
Fish Pepper Soup

Category: food
Description: Hot pepper soup with fresh catfish, scent leaves, and traditional spices
Price: 4200
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 25
Portion: medium
Spice level: very high

expected.reference_review: This pepper soup got the smell right before I even tasted it. The fish was fresh, the heat was serious, and the scent leaves gave it that proper Port Harcourt feel.

notes: Persona uses Pidgin English, output should reflect that register naturally without losing it.
user_persona: Lagos area boy, no time for long English, talks in Pidgin, wants chop wey go reach.
product_details:
Product:
Rice and Stew Plate

Category: food
Description: Plain white rice with small stew, no protein included, packaged in basic foil tray
Price: 2500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 40
Portion: small
Spice level: low

expected.reference_review: Omo the rice small well well and the stew no even plenty. For 2500 NGN with no protein, e no reach person wey wan chop belleful.

notes: Trade-off case: food is excellent but packaging leaked. Rating should reflect mixed experience.
user_persona: Abuja office worker, particular about presentation, hates messy packaging, values flavour.
product_details:
Product:
Grilled Chicken Wrap

Category: food
Description: Delicious grilled chicken wrap with peppery sauce, arrived in a soaked paper bag with sauce leaking through
Price: 3000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 20
Portion: medium
Spice level: medium high

expected.reference_review: The chicken wrap tasted good and the peppery sauce worked, but the packaging was messy. The paper bag was soaked and sauce leaked everywhere, so presentation pulled the score down.

notes: Kano resident knows real suya, should reward authentic seasoning and call out shortcuts.
user_persona: Kano-based suya enthusiast who grew up eating from real mai suya stands.
product_details:
Product:
Beef Suya Wrap

Category: food
Description: Generous beef suya with yaji spice, raw onions, tomato, and cabbage in soft wrap
Price: 2800
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 22
Portion: medium
Spice level: high

expected.reference_review: This suya wrap was done well. The beef was generous, the yaji had proper heat, and the onions and tomato made it feel close to what I expect from a real mai suya.

notes: Enugu reviewer should reward proper egusi cooking and call out shortcuts.
user_persona: Enugu resident, eats egusi soup weekly, judges by oil layer, seed grind, and meat quality.
product_details:
Product:
Egusi Soup with Pounded Yam

Category: food
Description: Thick egusi soup with assorted meat and dried fish, served with fresh pounded yam
Price: 4500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 35
Portion: large
Spice level: medium

expected.reference_review: The egusi was thick, well ground, and had enough oil without becoming heavy. The assorted meat, dried fish, and fresh pounded yam made it feel like a proper Enugu meal.

notes: Indomie reviewer with low expectations should rate strongly when street-style execution is right.
user_persona: University of Lagos student, eats indomie three times a week, knows the difference between bad and good preparation.
product_details:
Product:
Indomie with Egg and Sausage

Category: food
Description: Properly seasoned indomie noodles with two fried eggs, sausage slices, and chopped pepper
Price: 1500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 12
Portion: medium
Spice level: medium

expected.reference_review: As a UNILAG student that eats indomie often, this one was prepared well. The seasoning was balanced, pepper was chopped in nicely, and the egg plus sausage made the portion feel complete.

notes: Diaspora returnee should compare against expectations from abroad without dismissing local context.
user_persona: Nigerian returnee from the UK, used to higher hygiene standards, wants Lagos food at international plating.
product_details:
Product:
Jollof Rice Premium Bowl

Category: food
Description: Smoky jollof rice with grilled chicken in clean ceramic-style packaging with proper cutlery included
Price: 6500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 28
Portion: medium
Spice level: medium

expected.reference_review: The jollof had good smoky flavour and the packaging was clean, with proper cutlery included. I still expected slightly better plating for the price, but it met a decent Lagos premium standard.

notes: Lagos commuter sensitive to driver behaviour and route choice should weigh both.
user_persona: Lagos professional, commutes daily, rates rides by driver attitude and route awareness, hates argument over routes.
product_details:
Product:
Bolt Ride from Lekki to Ikeja

Category: transport
Description: Driver took the third mainland bridge route, vehicle was clean and ac worked, arrival was 70 minutes for what was estimated as 50 minutes
Price: 5800
Currency: NGN

expected.reference_review: The driver was polite and the car was clean, but the route choice still added time compared with the estimate. I appreciated the AC, just not the extra 20 minutes in Lagos traffic.

notes: Online shopper should penalize colour and fit mismatch against advertised photos.
user_persona: Lagos lady who shops on Instagram, particular about colours matching the post, sensitive to fabric quality.
product_details:
Product:
Floral Ankara Maxi Dress

Category: fashion
Description: Dress arrived in faded pink instead of bright coral as shown in photos, fabric was thinner than advertised, fit was acceptable
Price: 12000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 4320

expected.reference_review: The colour did not match the Instagram post; I ordered bright coral and got faded pink. The fabric was thinner than advertised, and only the fit saved it from being worse.

notes: Professional buyer should reward build quality but flag accessory shortcuts at premium price.
user_persona: Abuja consultant working remotely, needs reliable laptop, willing to pay for quality, hates compromises at high price.
product_details:
Product:
ProMax 14 Laptop

Category: electronics
Description: Sleek aluminium laptop with strong battery and fast SSD, charger feels light and there is no carry case included
Price: 720000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 1440

expected.reference_review: The laptop itself is fast, sleek, and the battery is strong enough for remote work. At this price though, the light charger and no carry case feel like unnecessary compromises.

notes: Patient with health anxiety should weigh staff compassion against wait time.
user_persona: Ibadan patient anxious about her test results, sensitive to how staff communicate, hates being treated as a number.
product_details:
Product:
Private Clinic Consultation

Category: service
Description: Doctor explained test results clearly and with patience, but the wait before the appointment was 90 minutes past the scheduled time
Price: 25000
Currency: NGN

expected.reference_review: The doctor explained my test results with patience and made me feel calm, but the wait was too long for a private clinic appointment. Good communication, poor time management.

notes: Mobile data customer should penalize speed mismatch even when price seems fair.
user_persona: Lagos remote worker on Zoom calls all day, needs stable connection, signs up for unlimited plans expecting consistent speed.
product_details:
Product:
Monthly Unlimited Data Plan

Category: service
Description: Plan advertised as unlimited 4G speed, actual speed drops to 2G after 30GB usage, customer support response time was 48 hours
Price: 15000
Currency: NGN

expected.reference_review: Calling this unlimited is misleading when the speed drops to 2G after 30GB. Customer support taking two days made it worse, so it cannot work for serious Zoom calls.

notes: Premium spender hosting a birthday should reward presentation and full quality match.
user_persona: Lagos professional hosting her sister birthday dinner, prioritizes presentation, plating, and authentic taste over price.
product_details:
Product:
Party Tray for 10 People

Category: food
Description: Large party tray with smoky jollof, fried rice, peppered chicken, peppered beef, plantain, and salad, plated beautifully with garnishes
Price: 45000
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 30
Portion: large
Spice level: medium high

expected.reference_review: The party tray looked beautiful and the plating made the birthday dinner feel properly arranged. The smoky jollof, peppered chicken, beef, plantain, and salad all tasted fresh.

notes: Health-conscious persona should reward grilled non-oily protein with clear positives.
user_persona: Health-conscious Lagos professional, avoids oily food, prefers grilled protein and vegetables, watches sodium.
product_details:
Product:
Grilled Tilapia and Vegetables

Category: food
Description: Whole grilled tilapia with steamed vegetables, light salt and herbs, no extra oil added
Price: 5500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 35
Portion: medium
Spice level: low

expected.reference_review: The grilled tilapia was exactly the kind of meal I wanted. The vegetables were fresh, salt was light, and there was no extra oil making it heavy.

notes: Yoruba aunty who has attended many owanbe should reward party jollof execution.
user_persona: Yoruba aunty in her fifties, attends owanbe every weekend, judges party jollof by smoky firewood taste and how the meat is cooked.
product_details:
Product:
Firewood Party Jollof

Category: food
Description: Heavily smoky party jollof cooked over firewood with assorted meat including goat, beef, and turkey wings
Price: 7500
Currency: NGN
Delivery minutes: 40
Portion: large
Spice level: medium high

expected.reference_review: This is the kind of smoky party jollof that reminds me of proper owanbe cooking. The firewood taste came through and the goat, beef, and turkey were cooked well.
